dependencies: Unity built-in render pipeline compatible particles/materials
Unity Package Manager local package reference
known_risks: ParticleSystem prefabs are presentation-only and need gameplay-safe main-lane authority wrappers before use in hazards or objectives.
Transparent steam and vapor effects require final in-game overdraw profiling on mid/low Windows hardware.
Preview renders are proof images and are not shipping gameplay content.
rollback_path: delete isolated package root or remove local package reference com.brassworks.sidecar.steam-fx-set06
particle_system_note: ParticleSystem components are presentation-only and have no gameplay authority.
